title: Narrative Devices
editorialSummary: Literary narrative techniques grouped by their function in a story; the false trail is that flashback and in medias res both involve non-linear time, making them easy to conflate — but flashback interrupts the present while in medias res is a story's opening strategy.

meta.gptRationale: This is the hardest kind of medium-theme puzzle here because it mixes several layers of literary terminology with genuinely specialized rhetorical figures.
